languages.text: {n}Ответу Мастера вокса предшествует явственная пауза.{/n} "Боюсь, что нет, Лорд-капитан. Блюстители под руководством Мастера дисциплины опросили всех, кто входил в круг общения генетора Фебруса за последнюю неделю. Никаких полезных сведений получить не удалось, за исключением упоминаний о крайне нестабильном эмоциональном состоянии. Был отдан приказ вскрыть его личный сервочереп для проверки, но выяснилось, что досточтимый генетор забрал его с собой".

{n}The Vox Master's reply is preceded by a distinct pause.{/n} "I'm afraid not, Lord Captain. The enforcers, under the direction of the Master-at-Arms, have interrogated everyone associated with Genetor Februs over the past week. No useful information could be obtained, except for the mention of his highly unstable emotional state. An order was issued to force access to his personal servo-skull for inspection, but it was discovered that the esteemed Genetor had taken the unit with him."
languages.original_text: {n}Ответу Мастера вокса предшествует явственная пауза.{/n} "Боюсь, что нет, Лорд-капитан. languages.text: {n}ボックス・マスターの返答は、明確な沈黙で始まる。{/n} 「申し訳ありませんが、船長殿。武器長の下で、過去1週間、ジェネトル・フェブルスに関連する全員を、執行官が尋問しました。ジェネトル・フェブルスの精神状態は非常に不安定であるという事以外、有益な情報は得られませんでした。彼の個人用サーボ・スカルへの強制アクセスを命じましたが、ジェネトルがそのユニットを携行していたことが判明しました。」
languages.original_text: {n}The Vox Master's reply is preceded by a distinct pause.{/n} "I'm afraid not, Lord Captain. The enforcers, under the direction of the Master-at-Arms, have interrogated everyone associated with Genetor Februs over the past week. No useful information could be obtained, except for the mention of his highly unstable emotional state. An order was issued to force access to his personal servo-skull for inspection, but it was discovered that the esteemed Genetor had taken the unit with him."

traits.locale_text: ボックス・マスターの返答は、明確な沈黙で始まる。 「申し訳ありませんが、船長殿。武器長の下で、過去1週間、ジェネトル・フェブルスに関連する全員を、執行官が尋問しました。ジェネトル・フェブルスの精神状態は非常に不安定であるという事以外、有益な情報は得られませんでした。彼の個人用サーボ・スカルへの強制アクセスを命じましたが、ジェネトルがそのユニットを携行していたことが判明しました。」

languages.text: {n}La maestra de vocos hace una pausa antes de responder.{/n} «Me temo que no, Lord Capitán. El personal de seguridad, siguiendo órdenes de la maestra de armas, ha interrogado a todos los que hayan tenido contacto con el genetor Februs en la última semana. No han sacado nada útil, excepto que su estado mental era muy inestable. Se ha emitido una orden para forzar el acceso a su servocráneo personal, pero el estimado genetor se lo ha llevado consigo».
languages.original_text: {n}The Vox Master's reply is preceded by a distinct pause.{/n} "I'm afraid not, Lord Captain. The enforcers, under the direction of the Master-at-Arms, have interrogated everyone associated with Genetor Februs over the past week. No useful information could be obtained, except for the mention of his highly unstable emotional state. An order was issued to force access to his personal servo-skull for inspection, but it was discovered that the esteemed Genetor had taken the unit with him."

traits.locale_text: {n}La maestra de vocos hace una pausa antes de responder.{/n} «Me temo que no, Lord Capitán. El personal de seguridad, siguiendo órdenes de la maestra de armas, ha interrogado a todos los que hayan tenido contacto con el genetor Februs en la última semana. No han sacado nada útil, excepto que su estado mental era muy inestable. Se ha emitido una orden para forzar el acceso a su servocráneo personal, pero el estimado genetor se lo ha llevado consigo».

languages.text: {n}Die Voxmeisterin antwortet erst nach einer quälenden Pause.{/n} "Ich fürchte nein, Lord Captain. Die Enforcer haben auf Befehl der Waffenmeisterin bereits alle Personen befragt, die in der letzten Woche Kontakt zu Genetor Februs hatten. Wir haben lediglich in Erfahrung gebracht, dass sein emotionaler Status sehr instabil war. Der Versuch, sich gewaltsamen Zugang zu seinem persönlichen Servoschädel zu verschaffen scheiterte an dem Umstand, dass der geschätzte Genetor die Einheit mitgenommen hat."
languages.original_text: {n}The Vox Master's reply is preceded by a distinct pause.{/n} "I'm afraid not, Lord Captain. The enforcers, under the direction of the Master-at-Arms, have interrogated everyone associated with Genetor Februs over the past week. No useful information could be obtained, except for the mention of his highly unstable emotional state. An order was issued to force access to his personal servo-skull for inspection, but it was discovered that the esteemed Genetor had taken the unit with him."

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Voxmeisterin antwortet erst nach einer quälenden Pause.{/n} "Ich fürchte nein, Lord Captain. Die Enforcer haben auf Befehl der Waffenmeisterin bereits alle Personen befragt, die in der letzten Woche Kontakt zu Genetor Februs hatten. Wir haben lediglich in Erfahrung gebracht, dass sein emotionaler Status sehr instabil war. Der Versuch, sich gewaltsamen Zugang zu seinem persönlichen Servoschädel zu verschaffen scheiterte an dem Umstand, dass der geschätzte Genetor die Einheit mitgenommen hat."

languages.text: {n}La maîtresse-vox marque un temps d'arrêt avant de vous répondre.{/n} « J'ai bien peur que non, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Sur ordre de la capitaine d'armes, les prévôts ont interrogé toutes les personnes ayant été en contact avec le genetor Februs au cours de la semaine écoulée. Nous n'avons obtenu aucune information pertinente, mis à part que son état émotionnel semblait extrêmement instable. L'ordre a été donné d'inspecter son servocrâne personnel, mais il s'est avéré que l'illustre genetor a pris soin d'emporter l'unité avec lui. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Vox Master's reply is preceded by a distinct pause.{/n} "I'm afraid not, Lord Captain. The enforcers, under the direction of the Master-at-Arms, have interrogated everyone associated with Genetor Februs over the past week. No useful information could be obtained, except for the mention of his highly unstable emotional state. An order was issued to force access to his personal servo-skull for inspection, but it was discovered that the esteemed Genetor had taken the unit with him."

traits.locale_text: {n}La maîtresse-vox marque un temps d'arrêt avant de vous répondre.{/n} « J'ai bien peur que non, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Sur ordre de la capitaine d'armes, les prévôts ont interrogé toutes les personnes ayant été en contact avec le genetor Februs au cours de la semaine écoulée. Nous n'avons obtenu aucune information pertinente, mis à part que son état émotionnel semblait extrêmement instable. L'ordre a été donné d'inspecter son servocrâne personnel, mais il s'est avéré que l'illustre genetor a pris soin d'emporter l'unité avec lui. »

languages.text: {n}音阵大师在回答前有明显的迟疑。{/n}“恐怕是的，舰长大人。戒律大师手下的执法者已审讯了过去一周内与基因士费布鲁斯相关的所有人员，未能获得任何有价值的情报。唯一被反复提及的，是他极不稳定的精神状态。我们已下令强制调取他的私人伺服头骨，但发现这位尊贵的基因士已将该单位一并带走。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Vox Master's reply is preceded by a distinct pause.{/n} "I'm afraid not, Lord Captain. The enforcers, under the direction of the Master-at-Arms, have interrogated everyone associated with Genetor Februs over the past week. No useful information could be obtained, except for the mention of his highly unstable emotional state. An order was issued to force access to his personal servo-skull for inspection, but it was discovered that the esteemed Genetor had taken the unit with him."

traits.locale_text: {n}音阵大师在回答前有明显的迟疑。{/n}“恐怕是的，舰长大人。戒律大师手下的执法者已审讯了过去一周内与基因士费布鲁斯相关的所有人员，未能获得任何有价值的情报。唯一被反复提及的，是他极不稳定的精神状态。我们已下令强制调取他的私人伺服头骨，但发现这位尊贵的基因士已将该单位一并带走。”

languages.text: {n}Voks Üstadı, belirgin bir duraksamanın ardından cevap veriyor.{/n} "Korkarım yok Lord Kaptan. Silahtar'ın yönetimindeki infazcılar, geçen hafta Genetör Februs ile ilişkili herkesi sorguladı. Duygu durumunun son derece dengesiz olmasından bahsedilmesi dışında yararlı bir bilgi elde edilemedi. İnceleme için kişisel hizmeletine zorla erişilmesi emri verildi ancak saygıdeğer Genetör'ün, birimi yanına aldığı ortaya çıktı."
